apt_groups.name: Lazarus Group
apt_groups.description: State-sponsored group linked to North Korean Reconnaissance General Bureau. Known for SWIFT banking attacks, cryptocurrency theft exceeding $3B, and destructive wiper attacks. Responsible for WannaCry ransomware and the Bybit $1.5B crypto heist in 2025.

behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: financial institutions and crypto exchanges globally

apt_groups.name: APT28
apt_groups.description: Russian GRU Unit 26165. Highly sophisticated group targeting government, military, and political organizations. Linked to 2016 US election interference and ongoing campaigns against NATO members.

behavioral_dna.code_style: C/C++, Delphi, Python, Go - modular architecture
behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: political and military targets, election interference

apt_groups.name: APT29
apt_groups.description: Russian SVR Foreign Intelligence Service. Extremely patient, stealthy operators. Known for SolarWinds supply chain attack (SUNBURST) and Microsoft corporate breach 2024. Longest dwell times of any tracked group.

behavioral_dna.code_style: multiple languages, very clean code, minimal footprint
behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: intelligence value - governments, research, vaccine, biotech

apt_groups.name: Sandworm
apt_groups.description: Russian GRU Unit 74455. Most destructive cyber group known. Responsible for Ukraine power grid attacks (2015/2016), NotPetya ($10B damage), and ongoing critical infrastructure attacks against Ukraine.

operational_hours.notes: Moscow hours, high intensity during conflicts

behavioral_dna.code_style: C/C++ specialized ICS knowledge, wiper expertise
behavioral_dna.lateral_movement_preference: credentials plus legitimate tools plus ICS protocols
behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: critical infrastructure in geopolitical targets, Ukraine priority

apt_groups.name: APT41
apt_groups.description: Chinese MSS-linked group operating both state-sponsored espionage and financially motivated cybercrime. Known for supply chain attacks, healthcare data theft, and unique dual-hat operations.

behavioral_dna.c2_beacon_interval: 6-24 hours espionage, active during financial ops
behavioral_dna.lateral_movement_preference: supply chain injection, legitimate software trojaning
behavioral_dna.exfil_method: staged exfil through compromised internal hosts
behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: IP-rich sectors plus gaming for financial gain

apt_groups.name: Volt Typhoon
apt_groups.description: Chinese state group focused on pre-positioning in US critical infrastructure. Distinguished by almost exclusive use of living-off-the-land techniques with zero custom malware. Subject of CISA/FBI joint advisory 2023.

behavioral_dna.c2_beacon_interval: long 24-72 hours, uses SOHO routers as proxies
behavioral_dna.infrastructure_reuse: uses victim infrastructure, minimal own infra
behavioral_dna.exfil_method: low and slow through legitimate channels
behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: strategic pre-positioning, critical infrastructure, wartime activation

apt_groups.name: Salt Typhoon
apt_groups.description: Chinese state-sponsored group that compromised major US telecoms (AT&T, Verizon, T-Mobile) to intercept wiretap systems and communications metadata. Described as the worst telecom hack in US history.

behavioral_dna.exfil_method: bulk data collection through network taps

apt_groups.name: APT35
apt_groups.description: Iranian IRGC-linked group known for targeted social engineering, mobile device compromise, and tracking Iranian dissidents. Major surge in activity during Middle East escalation 2023-2025.

operational_hours.notes: Tehran hours, increased activity during regional tensions

behavioral_dna.code_style: PowerShell, Python, macro-based documents, mobile implants
behavioral_dna.exfil_method: cloud storage (Google Drive, OneDrive), email exfil
behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: dissidents, journalists, academics, nuclear researchers, Israeli targets

apt_groups.name: MuddyWater
apt_groups.description: Iranian MOIS-linked group. Primarily targets governments and telecoms in the Middle East. Distinguished by heavy use of legitimate RMM tools for persistent access.

behavioral_dna.c2_beacon_interval: active - uses legitimate RMM tools for real-time access
behavioral_dna.infrastructure_reuse: high - reuses phishing templates and C2 patterns
behavioral_dna.lateral_movement_preference: RMM tools, RDP with stolen credentials
behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: Middle East government and telecom, geopolitical neighbors of Iran

apt_groups.name: OilRig
apt_groups.description: Iranian MOIS-linked group focused on strategic espionage against Middle Eastern governments and energy sector. Known for DNS tunneling expertise and custom backdoors.

behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: Middle East governments, energy sector, strategic intelligence

apt_groups.name: Kimsuky
apt_groups.description: North Korean RGB unit focused on intelligence collection, policy research theft, and cryptocurrency operations. Known for highly personalized spearphishing impersonating journalists and academics.

behavioral_dna.infrastructure_reuse: high - reuses email accounts and domains
behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: North Korea policy experts, nuclear researchers, think tanks

apt_groups.name: Transparent Tribe
apt_groups.description: Pakistani state-linked group with near-exclusive focus on Indian military and government targets. Persistent campaigns using CrimsonRAT and Android malware targeting Indian armed forces.

behavioral_dna.infrastructure_reuse: very high - reuses C2 infrastructure extensively

apt_groups.name: Turla
apt_groups.description: Russian FSB Center 16-linked group. One of the oldest and most sophisticated cyber espionage groups. Known for the Snake/Uroburos rootkit and satellite internet hijacking for C2. Dismantled Snake network in 2023 via FBI operation MEDUSA.

language_artifacts: Russian language artifacts in early tools
behavioral_dna.target_selection_logic: diplomatic and government intelligence targets, NATO focus
